name: agent-board
description: Manage AI agent development tasks with a real-time kanban board in VS Code

agentBoard.notifications.taskCompleted.description: Show notification when a task is completed

agentBoard.notifications.taskBlocked.description: Show notification when a task is blocked

walkthroughs.title: Get Started with Agent Board
walkthroughs.description: Learn how to set up and use Agent Board to manage AI agent tasks.

steps.title: Welcome to Agent Board
steps.description:
Agent Board helps you manage AI agent development tasks with a real-time kanban board.

[Read the docs](https://github.com/kimgyuilli/agent-board)

steps.title: Open the Board
steps.description:
Open the kanban board to view and manage your tasks.

[Open Agent Board](command:agent-board.showBoard)

steps.title: Connect MCP Server
steps.description: Configure your AI agent to connect to the Agent Board MCP server.

steps.title: Create Your First Phase
steps.description: Use the add_phase MCP tool to create your first project phase.

steps.title: Setup Your Project
steps.description:
Generate .claude/ config and CLAUDE.md for your workspace.

[Run Setup Wizard](command:agent-board.setupProject)

scripts.prebuild: node -e "import('fs').then(f=>{if(!f.existsSync('../webview/dist')){console.error('ERROR: ../webview/dist not found. Build webview first.');process.exit(1);}if(!f.existsSync('../mcp-server/dist/board-server.js')){console.error('ERROR: ../mcp-server/dist/board-server.js not found. Build mcp-server first.');process.exit(1);}f.cpSync('../webview/dist','dist/webview',{recursive:true});f.cpSync('../mcp-server/dist/board-server.js','dist/board-server.js');})"
